entries.title: Crumpled paper physics, boredom buddy avatars, and streamlined kid switching
entries.summary: Major visual polish day — redesigned the paper balls to look like real crumpled paper, added a full avatar system with six unique animal 'Boredom Buddies,' and simplified the kid-switching flow from three steps to one.

entries.title: Massive polish day — sharing, detail redesign, bug fixes, and 57 new tests
entries.summary: Overhauled the detail screen with road trip branding and splash animations, shipped activity sharing with branded cards and pretty URLs, audited and improved 665+ activities, squashed 15 bugs, and added 57 unit tests.
